vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange
Vehicle context: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach
Suggested material: Al 7075 + steel + composite, process: CNC + LPBF

args.text: Assembly Instructions: Ensure proper alignment and torque specifications are followed.

generated_parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
generated_parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

requirements: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409
Mounting flange ISO 9409 compliant
Base plate with mounting holes, leveling, and cable entry
Harmonic drive and cooling fins for thermal management
Bearing housing for revolute bearing
Motor connector for electrical integration
Sensor pocket for avionics
Service access, inspection window/callout, primary datum, fastener/insert/washer feature, and harness/connector path

verify.rule: All required fields and evidence features are present.
The estimated mass is within the vehicle's mass budget.
Each required feature in the part_tree has corresponding geometry_ops.
Adjacent interfaces and required features are named and reciprocal.
Critical joints have visible locking methods and preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on the harmonic drive due to insufficient cooling.
risk.mit: Increase the number of cooling fins or optimize their placement.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical interference if motor connector is not properly shielded.
risk.mit: Add shielding to the motor connector and ensure proper grounding.

risk.desc: Structural integrity may be compromised if fastener engagement length is inadequate.
risk.mit: Specify minimum engagement lengths for all fasteners and ensure compliance.

risk.desc: Service access might be limited if hatch size is too small.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the service access hatch to accommodate tools and hands.

risk.desc: Inspection windows may not provide sufficient visibility if positioned incorrectly.
risk.mit: Reposition inspection windows to critical areas for better visibility.

physics_paths.description: Base plate rotates around Z axis
Heat dissipation from harmonic drive to cooling fins
Power and control signals from motor controller to motor

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate base plate and mounting holes for structural integrity
Optimize cooling fin placement for heat dissipation
Ensure proper routing and protection of power cables

manufacturing_strategy.process: CNC machining for base plate and housing, LPBF for complex internal components
manufacturing_strategy.datum: Base plate center and mounting holes
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: ±0.1mm for machined parts, ±0.2mm for printed parts
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures for overhangs during printing, orientation optimized for minimal distortion
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for surface finish, CMM for dimensional accuracy

verification_focus.description: Verify base plate strength and mounting hole pattern alignment
Measure temperature rise under rated torque to ensure cooling efficiency
Test motor connector for correct signal transmission and power delivery

Allow cable conduit for electrical and data signal flow.
Enable easy maintenance and inspection.

verify.rule: All required fields are present.

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness due to thin base flange.
risk.mit: Increase thickness of base flange or add reinforcement.

risk.desc: Insufficient evidence for fastener locking methods.

risk.desc: Limited service access for maintenance.

physics_paths.path_description: Load from lower arm link transferred through base flange to upper arm link.
Cable conduit allows electrical and data signal flow between joints.
Thermal management through link body, dissipating heat generated by motors and electronics.

internal_feature_targets.description: Hollow cylindrical body providing structural integrity.
Rib structure reinforcing the link body against torsional loads.
Flange connecting the upper arm to the shoulder joint.
Conduit allowing cables to pass through the link body.
Cutout providing access for maintenance and inspection.
Pocket housing sensors for monitoring link health.

verification_focus.description: Verification of link body's ability to withstand specified loads.

Verification of service access cutout's accessibility for maintenance.
